u with rightwards arrow on top space equals space 3 i with rightwards arrow on top space minus space 2 j with rightwards arrow on top space comma space v with rightwards arrow on top space equals space minus i with rightwards arrow on top space plus space 4 j with rightwards arrow on top space comma space d a n space r with rightwards arrow on top space equals space 7 i with rightwards arrow on top space minus space 8 j with rightwards arrow on top
